canonical_question: What are SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration) capabilities - message limits, adapters, licensing?
aliases: SAP CPI capabilities and message limits
SAP Cloud Integration adapter types and rate limits
SAP Integration Suite licensing and pricing model
SAP BTP Integration Suite components overview

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: 2024 — BTPEA model introduced replacing CPEA for new contracts

constraints: Message counting: each outgoing message up to 250 KB payload = 1 message; larger payloads counted in 250 KB slices
Base quota: 10,000 messages/month included; additional messages sold in blocks of 10,000
All tenant environments (DEV, QAS, PROD) are metered independently
Edge Integration Cell traffic receives 50% discount (factor 0.5)
Standard SAP pre-built content packages are free only if unmodified
JMS queues limited to 9 per tenant, 4 GB storage, 30 days retention
Open Connectors being deprecated in favor of native adapters
Max HTTP payload 40 MB (configurable up to 100 MB with memory impact)

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs SAP PI/PO on-premise integration (not migrating to cloud)
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: SAP PI/PO documentation — this card covers cloud-native Integration Suite only

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs only SAP Event Mesh / event-driven architecture
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: SAP Event Mesh documentation — separate BTP service

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs third-party iPaaS comparison (MuleSoft, Boomi, Workato)

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
